_description: Cowork tab — macos__desktop_cowork__engineering_coworker profile. Provides: Cloudflare (docs + worker management), GitHub, filesystem, Chrome DevTools (browser automation), and the engineering-coworker Rust MCP binary (cargo/wrangler/git/D1 tools that Claude cloud can actually EXECUTE on this Mac).
_chrome_devtools_note: chrome-devtools spawns Chrome via Puppeteer — only works on macOS desktop, not in Claude cloud inference. Gives Claude browser automation and performance profiling.
_engineering_coworker_note: engineering-coworker is the Rust binary at target/debug/engineering-coworker. It bridges Claude (cloud) to local cargo/wrangler/git/D1 commands. Must be compiled first: cargo build -p engineering-coworker
